workflow.title: Givia
workflow.subtitle: A bright editorial gifting experience for international relationships

hero.headline: Let the gift be understood before the gesture is delivered
hero.description: Givia edits gift semantics, relationship distance, and cultural tact into one executable gifting brief for a more refined international experience.
hero.panelHeadline: An authored gifting proposal for global relationships
hero.panelDesc: Not just whether a gift works, but why it lands, how it should be sent, and what to change when it does not.

recognition.title: Chapter 1: Create the gift profile
recognition.description: Upload the key visual and add object notes so the system understands the gift before cultural judgment begins.
recognition.upload: Click to upload or drag the gift image
recognition.placeholder: Supports JPG, PNG, WEBP; clearer material and packaging details are better
recognition.loading: Composing the gift reading, please wait...

country.title: Chapter 2: Compose the cultural frame
country.description: Choose the destination and add recipient, occasion, and tact so the gift enters a real social context.

analysis.title: Chapter 3: Generate the proposal
analysis.description: The system turns gift signals, etiquette, and relationship roles into one final recommendation and alternative path.
analysis.loading: Composing the cultural proposal, this may take a moment...
analysis.noRecognition: Please upload and recognize a gift first
analysis.noCountry: Please select a target country first

tooltip.culturalFit: Cultural Fit measures how comfortably the gift aligns with the target context. Higher scores suggest it will be received more naturally and tactfully.
tooltip.riskLevel: Cultural Friction Level reflects the degree of misreading, discomfort, or etiquette conflict the gift may trigger in the destination culture.
tooltip.semanticSignals: Semantic Signals describe the symbolic readings, associations, and social interpretations the gift may activate in that culture.
tooltip.packaging: Packaging Direction helps shape the first impression through color, material, texture, and presentation choices.
tooltip.greetingCard: Greeting Tone helps your wording feel aligned with the gift, the relationship, and the social context.

errors.uploadFailed: Image upload failed, please try again
errors.recognitionFailed: Recognition failed, please ensure the image contains a valid gift
errors.analysisFailed: Analysis failed, please check your network connection and try again
